CodificationSection 20 of act , was amended in its entirety by , , , which consolidated the text of said section 20 into a single unlettered paragraph, classified to . Prior to the 1968 amendment said section 20 was comprised of subsecs. (a) to (c). Subsec. (a) was classified to this section, and subsecs. (b) and (c) were classified to sections 1598 and 1641, respectively, of this title.July 22, 1954Aug. 23, 1968section 10 of Pub. L. 90–49682 Stat. 841section 1641 of this title
